2026-06-02T13:28:43.945493Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:21high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. FTP on TCP/21 is filtered: cleartext credentials & data exfiltration. Disable or replace with SFTP (port 22 inside a bastion) or FTPS over TLS 1.2+; block 21/tcp at the perimeter.
2026-06-02T13:28:43.945536Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:22high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. SSH on TCP/22 is filtered: remote interactive shell. Restrict to bastion hosts behind a VPN; enforce key-based auth + hardware MFA; deny root login; fail2ban; audit authorized_keys.

2026-06-02T13:28:43.953793Zblock_port127.0.0.1:135critical0.95FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. MSRPC on TCP/135 is open: Windows RPC endpoint mapper. Block 135/137-139/445 at the perimeter; segregate Windows administration to a management VLAN.

2026-06-02T13:28:43.953921Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:139high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. NETBIOS-SSN on TCP/139 is filtered: legacy SMB session. Disable SMBv1; block 139/445 externally; require Kerberos + SMB signing internally.

2026-06-02T13:28:43.971340Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:512high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. REXEC on TCP/512 is filtered: legacy Berkeley remote shell. Remove rexec/rlogin/rsh; replace with SSH; block 512-514/tcp.
2026-06-02T13:28:43.971378Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:513high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. RLOGIN on TCP/513 is filtered: legacy trust-based remote login. Decommission; replace with SSH key auth.
2026-06-02T13:28:43.971416Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:514high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. SYSLOG/RSH on TCP/514 is filtered: cleartext logging & legacy shell. Use TLS-protected syslog (RFC 5425) or HTTPS-based log shipping; remove rsh entirely.

2026-06-02T13:28:44.066778Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:2375high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. DOCKER on TCP/2375 is filtered: unauthenticated Docker API. Never expose 2375; use 2376 with mTLS only on management networks; prefer Unix socket + sudo.
2026-06-02T13:28:44.066816Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:2376high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. DOCKER-TLS on TCP/2376 is filtered: Docker API (TLS). Restrict to management VLAN; rotate client certs; prefer SSH+kubectl/docker context.
